text: The correlation between opponent turnover rate and first-round series length shows that high-pressure defenses reduce series to five games or fewer at a 38% higher rate than passive defenses.
label: analysis

text: Expansion teams should never be allowed to immediately compete for championships through free agency. The league structure rewards disloyalty and it needs to change.
label: hot_take

text: I genuinely thought it was over. Twice. And then somehow it wasn't. I've never been more emotionally exhausted watching a basketball game in my entire life.
label: reaction

text: Offensive rebound rate in the fourth quarter of playoff games is 1.7% higher than the season average for teams that are trailing, suggesting teams become more aggressive in desperate situations in a statistically measurable way.
label: analysis

text: Every analyst who said this team couldn't compete needs to be shown this box score every single day for the rest of their careers. Just embarrassing takes all season.
label: hot_take

text: I sat next to a kid at the game who had never seen his team win a playoff series before. He was fifteen years old and crying. I will never forget that.
